mapper.select: SELECT user_no, user_id, secu_pw, name_ko, name_en, rrn, phone, email, addr_ko, addr_detail_ko, zip_code_ko, addr_en, addr_detail_en, zip_code_en, gender, user_tendency, created_dt, updated_dt, last_login_at FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( user_no, user_id, secu_pw, name_ko, name_en, rrn, phone, email, addr_ko, addr_detail_ko, zip_code_ko, addr_en, addr_detail_en, zip_code_en, gender, user_tendency, created_dt ) VALUES ( seq_users.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{secuPw}, #{nameKo}, #{nameEn}, #{rrn}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{addrKo}, #{addrDetailKo}, #{zipCodeKo}, #{addrEn}, #{addrDetailEn}, #{zipCodeEn}, #{gender}, #{userTendency}, SYSDATE )
